Title: Verify the functionality of the NewBorn application
Preconditions: User has installed the NewBorn application on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Launch the NewBorn application on the Android device.
2. Navigate through the application to familiarize with its features.
3. Check if the application is able to monitor the baby's growth.
Expected Result: The application should be able to monitor the baby's growth.

Title: Verify the database functionality
Preconditions: User has launched the NewBorn application and is logged in.
Test Data: Sample data related to the baby's growth.
Test Steps:
1. Access the database within the NewBorn application.
2. Insert sample data related to the baby's growth.
3. Update the sample data.
4. Retrieve the updated data.
Expected Result: The database should be able to store, update, and retrieve the data related to the baby's growth.

Title: Verify the Firebase functionality
Preconditions: User has launched the NewBorn application and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the Firebase functionality within the NewBorn application.
2. Check if the Firebase is able to provide a real-time database for the baby's growth data.
Expected Result: The Firebase should be able to provide a real-time database for the baby's growth data.

Title: Verify the XML functionality
Preconditions: User has launched the NewBorn application and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the XML functionality within the NewBorn application.
2. Check if the XML is able to structure the markup of the application.
Expected Result: The XML should be able to structure the markup of the application.

Title: Verify the Java functionality
Preconditions: User has launched the NewBorn application and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the Java functionality within the NewBorn application.
2. Check if the Java is able to run the application.
Expected Result: The Java should be able to run the application.

Title: Verify the Android Studio functionality
Preconditions: User has launched the NewBorn application and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the Android Studio functionality within the NewBorn application.
2. Check if the Android Studio is able to develop the NewBorn application.
Expected Result: The Android Studio should be able to develop the NewBorn application.

Title: Verify the functionality for young families
Preconditions: User has installed the NewBorn application on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Launch the NewBorn application on the Android device.
2. Navigate through the application to familiarize with its features.
3. Check if the application is able to provide support to young families.
Expected Result: The application should be able to provide support to young families.

Title: Verify the functionality for families
Preconditions: User has installed the NewBorn application on an Android device with version superior to 8.1
Test Steps:
1. Launch the NewBorn application on the Android device.
2. Navigate through the application to familiarize with its features.
3. Check if the application is able to provide support to families.
Expected Result: The application should be able to provide support to families.

Title: Create Account
Preconditions: Have the application installed, have a Google account.
Test Steps:
1. Press "Sign in with Google" button.
2. Follow the Google sign-in process.
Expected Result: Successfully created a new account.

Title: Create Family
Preconditions: Created an account.
Test Steps:
1. Press the "Create" button.
2. Enter the necessary information for the new family.
Expected Result: Successfully created a new family.

Title: Add Member to Family
Preconditions: Created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Copy the family code.
2. Share the family code with the new member.
Expected Result: Successfully added a new member to the family.

Title: Record Sleep
Preconditions: Created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Press the "register" button.
2. Enter the sleep data.
Expected Result: Sleep data is saved and can be viewed from the home screen.

Title: Record Feeding
Preconditions: Created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Press the "register" button.
2. Enter the feeding data.
Expected Result: Feeding data is saved and can be viewed from the home screen.

Title: Record Growth
Preconditions: Created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Press the "register" button.
2. Enter the growth data (weight and height).
Expected Result: Growth data is saved and can be viewed from the home screen.

Title: Collaboration among Family Members
Preconditions: Created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Each family member uses the application on their own device.
2. Each family member can only view data related to their own family.
Expected Result: Family members can collaborate and view their own family's data.

Title: Create Family
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Family Management section
2. Click on the "Create Family" button
3. Enter family details (name, parents' names, etc.)
4. Save the family
Expected Result: A new family is created with the entered details.

Title: Monitor Baby's Sleep
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created a family
Test Data: Baby's sleep start and end times
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Sleep Monitoring section for the selected family
2. Enter the sleep start and end times
3. Save the sleep data
Expected Result: The baby's sleep data is saved with the entered start and end times.

Title: Monitor Baby's Feeding
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created a family
Test Data: Feeding start and end times, breast or bottle, right or left breast
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Feeding Monitoring section for the selected family
2. Enter the feeding start and end times
3. Select the feeding type (breast or bottle)
4. Select the breast side (right or left)
5. Save the feeding data
Expected Result: The baby's feeding data is saved with the entered start and end times, feeding type, and breast side.

Title: Monitor Baby's Growth
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created a family
Test Data: Baby's weight, height, head circumference, etc.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Growth Monitoring section for the selected family
2. Enter the baby's growth data
3. Save the growth data
Expected Result: The baby's growth data is saved with the entered measurements.

Title: Account Creation
Preconditions: The application is downloadable and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Select the option to create a new account.
4. Fill in the required information.
5. Click on the create account button.
Expected Result: The user is able to create a new account and navigate to the main menu.

Title: Family Creation
Preconditions: The user has created a new account.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the family creation screen.
2. Fill in the required information for the new family.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: A new family is created and the user is able to add members to it.

Title: Invite Family Members
Preconditions: The user has created a family.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the family management screen.
2. Click on the invite button.
3. Enter the email addresses of the family members to be invited.
4. Click on the send invites button.
Expected Result: The invited family members receive an email invitation to join the family.

Title: Baby Information Input
Preconditions: The user has created a family.
Test Data: Baby's name, date of birth, and gender.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the baby information input screen.
2. Fill in the required information for the baby.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The baby's information is saved and can be viewed in the family management screen.

Title: Feeding Tracking
Preconditions: The user has created a family and added a baby.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the feeding tracking screen.
2. Select the feeding type (e.g. breastfeeding, bottle feeding).
3. Enter the feeding time and amount.
4. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The feeding information is saved and can be viewed in the feeding history screen.

Title: Sleep Tracking
Preconditions: The user has created a family and added a baby.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sleep tracking screen.
2. Enter the sleep time and duration.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The sleep information is saved and can be viewed in the sleep history screen.

Title: Growth Tracking
Preconditions: The user has created a family and added a baby.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the growth tracking screen.
2. Enter the baby's weight and height.
3. Click on the save button.
Expected Result: The growth information is saved and can be viewed in the growth history screen.

Title: Resource Access
Preconditions: The user has created a family and added a baby.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the resources screen.
2. Select a resource (e.g. article, forum).
3. View the resource.
Expected Result: The user is able to access and view resources related to baby care and development.

Title: Login with Google Account
Preconditions: The user has a Google account.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Select the Google account login option.
4. Enter the Google account credentials.
5. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: The user is able to log in to the application using their Google account.
